name: A_RTL_P1
sentence: When RTL mode is selected, if the current altitude is less than RTL_ALT, then altitude must be increased until the altitude is greater or equal to the RTL_ALT.
CTL_formula: AG((mode = RTL) and (current_alt < RTL_ALT) -> AF(return_alt >= RTL_ALT))

name: A_RTL_P2
sentence: When RTL mode is selected, if the current altitude is greater or equal to RTL_ALT, current flight mode is RTL, and the current vehicle is not at home position, then the vehicle must move to the home position while maintaining the current altitude.
CTL_formula: AG((mode = RTL) and (current_alt >= RTL_ALT) and (has_arrived_home = false) -> AF((return_alt = current_alt)))

name: A_RTL_P3
sentence: When RTL mode is selected, if current altitude is greater or equal to RTL_ALT and the current vehicle has arrived home, then UAV must be LAND.
CTL_formula: AG((mode = RTL) and (current_alt >= RTL_ALT) and (has_arrived_home = true) -> AF(landed = true))

name: A_RTL_P4
sentence: When RTL mode is selected, if the vehicle touches the ground, then the vehicle must disarm motors.
CTL_formula: AG((mode = RTL) and (landed = true) -> AF(armed = false))

name: A_FLIP_P1
sentence: If and only if roll is less than 45 degree, throttle is greater or equal to 1,500, altitude is more than 10 meters, and the current flight mode is one of ACRO and ALT_HOLD, then the flight mode can be changed to FLIP.
CTL_formula: AG((mode = FLIP) -> AF(lastmode = ACRO) or (lastmode = ALT_HOLD) and (roll <= 45) and (throttle >= 1500) and (current_alt > 10))

name: A_FLIP_P2
sentence: If the current flight mode is FLIP and roll is between -90 and 45 degree, then rolling right at 400 degree per second.
CTL_formula: AG((mode = FLIP) and (-90 <= roll <= 45) -> AF(roll_rate = 400) and (roll_direction = right))

name: A_FLIP_P3
sentence: The vehicle should complete the rolling (A.FLIP2) within 2.5 seconds and must return to the original flight mode.
CTL_formula: AG((mode = FLIP) -> AF_[0,2.5](mode = lastmode))

name: A_ALTHOLD_P1
sentence: If the altitude source is the barometer, the vehicle must follow the altitude computed by this source, rather than the GPS.
CTL_formula: AG((alt_source = baro) -> AF((curr_alt = baro_alt) and (curr_alt != GPS_alt)))

name: A_ALTHOLD_P2
sentence: When alt hold mode is selected, if the throttle stick is in the middle (i.e., 1,500) the vehicle must maintain the current altitude.
CTL_formula: AG((mode = ALT_HOLD) and (throttle = 1500) -> AF(ALT = current_alt))

name: A_CIRCLE_P1
sentence: When circle mode is selected, pitch stick up must reduce the radius until it reaches zero.
CTL_formula: AG((mode = CIRCLE) and (RC_Pitch < 1500) and (Circle_radius > 0) -> AF(Circle_radius_change_rate < 0))

name: A_CIRCLE_P2
sentence: When circle mode is selected, pitch stick down must increase the radius.
CTL_formula: AG((mode = CIRCLE) and (RC_Pitch > 1500) and (Circle_radius > 0) -> AF(Circle_radius_change_rate > 0))

name: A_CIRCLE_P3
sentence: When circle mode is selected, Roll stick right (think clockwise) must increase the speed while moving clockwise.
CTL_formula: AG((mode = CIRCLE) and (RC_Roll > 1500) and (Circle_direction = clockwise) -> AF(Circle_speed_change_rate > 0))

name: A_CIRCLE_P4
sentence: When circle mode is selected, Roll stick right (think clockwise) must decrease the speed while moving counterclockwise.
CTL_formula: AG((mode = CIRCLE) and (RC_Roll > 1500) and (Circle_direction = counterclockwise) -> AF(Circle_speed_change_rate < 0))

name: A_CIRCLE_P5
sentence: When circle mode is selected, Roll stick left (think counterclockwise) must increase the speed while moving counterclockwise.
CTL_formula: AG((mode = CIRCLE) and (RC_Roll < 1500) and (Circle_direction = counterclockwise) -> AF(Circle_speed_change_rate > 0))

name: A_CIRCLE_P6
sentence: When circle mode is selected, Roll stick left (think counterclockwise) must decrease the speed while moving clockwise.
CTL_formula: AG((mode = CIRCLE) and (RC_Roll < 1500) and (Circle_direction = clockwise) -> AF(Circle_speed_change_rate < 0))

name: A_LAND_P1
sentence: Above 10 meters the vehicle must descend at the rate specified in the LAND_SPEED_HIGH parameter.
CTL_formula: AG((current_alt >= 10) and (mode = LAND) -> AF(speed_z = LAND_SPEED_HIGH))

name: A_LAND_P2
sentence: Below 10 meters the vehicle must descend at the rate specified in the LAND_SPEED parameter.
CTL_formula: AG((current_alt < 10) and (mode = LAND) -> AF(speed_z = LAND_SPEED))

name: A_BRAKE_P1
sentence: When the vehicle is in BRAKE mode, it must stop within k seconds.
CTL_formula: AG((mode = BRAKE) -> AF_[0,k](speed_x = 0) and (speed_y = 0) and (speed_z = 0))

name: A_DRIFT_P1
sentence: If the vehicle loses GPS signals in flight while in DRIFT mode, the vehicle must either LAND or enter ALT_HOLD mode based on FS_EKF_ACTION parameter.
CTL_formula: AG((mode = DRIFT) and (GPS_fail = ON) -> AF_[0,k]((mode = FS_EKF_ACTION)))

name: A_LOITER_P1
sentence: The vehicle must maintain a constant location, heading, and altitude.
CTL_formula: AG((mode = LOITER) -> AF((pos = current_pos) and (yaw = current_yaw) and (alt = current_alt)))

name: A_GUIDED_P1
sentence: If there is no more way point, the vehicle must stay at the same location, heading, and altitude.
CTL_formula: AG((mode = GUIDED) and (waypoint = 0) -> AF((pos = current_pos) and (yaw = current_yaw) and (alt = current_alt)))

name: A_SPORT_P1
sentence: In SPORT mode, the vehicle must climb as indicated by the PILOT_SPEED_UP parameter.
CTL_formula: AG((mode = SPORT) -> AF(speed_z = PILOT_SPEED_UP))

name: A_RCFS_P1
sentence: If and only if the vehicle is armed in ACRO mode and the throttle input is less than the minimum (FS_THR_VALUE parameter), the vehicle must immediately disarm.
CTL_formula: AG((mode = ACRO) and (throttle < FS_THR_VALUE) -> AF(disarmed = true))

name: A_RCFS_P2
sentence: If the throttle input is less than FS_THR_VALUE parameter, it must change the current mode to the RC fail-safe mode.
CTL_formula: AG((throttle < FS_THR_VALUE) -> AF(mode = RC_failsafe))

name: A_CHUTE_P1
sentence: Deploying a parachute requires following conditions: (1) the motors must be armed, (2) the vehicle must not be in the FLIP or ACRO flight modes, (3) the barometer must show that the vehicle is not climbing, and (4) the vehicle’s current altitude must be above the CHUTE_ALT_MIN parameter value.
CTL_formula: AG((Parachute = ON) -> AF((armed = true) and (mode != FLIP) and (mode != ACRO) and (current_alt >= CHUTE_ALT_MIN)))

name: A_GPSFS_P1
sentence: When the number of detected GPS satellites is less than four, the vehicle must trigger the GPS fail-safe mode.
CTL_formula: AG((GPS_sat < 4) -> AF(mode = GPS_failsafe))

name: A_GPSFS_P2
sentence: When the GPS fail-safe mode is triggered and there is a secondary altitude sensor, the vehicle must change the current primary altitude source to the secondary sensor.
CTL_formula: AG((mode = GPS_failsafe) and (Baro = ON) -> AF(alt_source = Baro))

name: A_LIVENESS_P1
sentence: it should be possible to enable the failsafe flight mode.
CTL_formula: EF(failsafe = ON)

name: A_SAFETY_P1
sentence: the worst-case execution time of fast loop should be at most Tw, not to impact the resulting rate of control loop execution.
CTL_formula: AG_[0,T_w](fast_loop_end)

name: A_SAFETY_P2
sentence: the time that fast loop takes to enable the failsafe mode should never exceed Tf.
CTL_formula: AG_[0,T_f](mode = failsafe)

name: A_FS_P1
sentence: after the failsafe mode is enabled, re-gaining a signal from the telemetry radio or the remote controller eventually disables it.
CTL_formula: AG((mode = failsafe) and (RC=ON) -> AF(mode != failsafe))

name: A_RCFS_P1
sentence: If enabled and set-up correctly the radio failsafe will trigger if any of these conditions occur for more than RC_FS_TIMEOUT seconds.
CTL_formula: AG((RC = OFF) -> AF_[>=RC_FS_TIMEOUT](mode = RC_failsafe))

name: A_BATTFS_P1
sentence: If enabled and set-up correctly the battery failsafe will trigger if the main battery’s voltage drops below the voltage held in the BATT_LOW_VOLT parameter (or FS_BATT_VOLTAGE in older versions) for more than 10 seconds.
CTL_formula: AG((V < BATT_LOW_VOLT) -> AF_[>=10](mode = BATT_failsafe))

name: A_GCSFS_P1
sentence: The following situations can cause a loss of GCS MAVLink heartbeat, triggering a GCS failsafe event after FS_GCS_TIMEOUT seconds.
CTL_formula: AG((GCS = OFF) -> AF_[>=FS_GCS_TIMEOUT](mode = GCS_failsafe))
